title: crataegus pentagyna subsp. pentagyna
intro: Crataegus pentagyna subsp. pentagyna, also known as the West African hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to tropical West Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Crataegus pentagyna subsp. pentagyna include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as hypertension and heart disease.
